OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: IP to fetch operating hour record. This will be used to default OH for existing record and display selected OH in review screen
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: PHOCS Fetch Operating Hour Record By ID

omniProcessElements.name: FetchOperatingHourRemote
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnFullDataJSON" : false, "remoteOptions" : { }, "remoteMethod" : "OperatingHourByID", "elementValueMap" : { }, "failOnStepError" : false, "responseFormat" : "", "isActive" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "actionMessage" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "id" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "sendJSONNode" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "internalNotes" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "remoteClass" : "PHOCSFoodPremiseLicenseController", "sendJSONPath" : "", "restOptions" : { } }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : [ ], "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : [ ], "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "transientValues" : { "activateOrDeactivateConsent" : false } }
